name: Astaxanthin
description: One of the most powerful antioxidants on earth — 6,000x stronger than vitamin C — derived from microalgae.
scientificSummary: A ketocarotenoid xanthophyll that is 6,000x more potent than vitamin C, 550x more potent than vitamin E as an antioxidant.
mechanismOfAction: Quenches singlet oxygen and reactive oxygen species across both lipid and aqueous phases of cell membranes simultaneously.

seo.title: Astaxanthin - Earth's Most Powerful Antioxidant | Dew Theory
seo.description: Explore how Astaxanthin, 6,000x stronger than Vitamin C, protects skin from aging and UV damage.
